children.text: Home to more than 70 rides and attractions. Open daily from Memorial Day to Labor Day and weekends in May and September. Included in your admission are 13 roller coasters, and access to the emBoardwalk at Hersheypark/em and emZooAmerica/em, giving you three attractions for the price of one!

There's no need to leave Hersheypark to enjoy a full-service meal in an air-conditioned restaurant! Enjoy delicious appetizers, freshly prepared wraps and salads, signature PA Dutch items, mouth-watering burgers, and chocolate desserts in a delightfully themed atmosphere including Carrousels, Coasters and Characters! Located at the entrance to Hersheypark.

A winter wonderland awaits at Hershey Sweet Lights, A Holiday Drive-Thru Spectacular. Enjoy nearly 600 illuminated, animated displays from the comfort of your car as you drive through two miles of wooded trails.

The Boardwalk At Hersheypark offers the best of two great family vacations - a trip to the seashore and a day at the theme park! Families and guests of all ages can enjoy a full waterpark experience offering nine fun-filled attractions, including one of the largest water-play structures in the world. Also, spend some time at The Shore, a 378,000 gallon wave pool, and Intercoastal Waterway, a lazy river stretching over 1,300 feet while enjoying all the food, games, and shops from your favorite Boardwalk memories.
Come to the Season Pass Office to purchase your Hersheypark Season Passes for the current, or upcoming season!

Get ready for a fun-filled day of Hershey's Happiness! Explore the Many Wonders of Chocolate with the FREE newly re-imagined Chocolate Tour Ride with free sample! Experience our attractions including Create Your Own Candy Bar, 4D Chocolate Mystery show, Chocolate Tasting Experience and Hershey Trolley Works. Have a bite to eat in our Food Court or Bakery and shop the world's largest Hershey's candy store.

Located next to Hersheypark, ZooAmerica offers an educational 11-acre walk-through zoo with more than 200 native animals from five regions of North America.  ZooAmerica is included in your Hersheypark regular admission when entered from within Hersheypark and open daily year-round as a separate attraction.

Located in the heart of Chocolate Town, U.S.A, this world-class museum guides visitors on an inspirational journey through Milton S. Hershey's lifetime and beyond. Also offering chocolate tastings and interactive demonstrations in the Chocolate Lab.
